action.content: Write a funny poem for kids about a product that you would like to sell. The poem should have exactly 6 stanzas. Separated the stanzas using 3 asterisk markers: ***
action.label: context

action.content:
I have a hat that talks to you,
With silly voices, loud and new!
It says "Good morning" when you wake,
And tells a joke before you take
A bite of toast or sip of tea,
The funniest hat you've ever seen!

***

It sings a song when you are sad,
About a dancing, happy tad.
It hums a tune when you are tired,
And makes your sleepy eyes get wider.
It whispers secrets in your ear,
About a dragon in your chair!

***

The hat can change its color too,
From bright blue sky to sunny view.
It turns to green when you eat grass,
Or pink as strawberries, fast as pass.
It flashes red when you are hot,
And glows like stars when you are not!

***

It tells you stories of the past,
Of dinosaurs and spacey blast.
It knows the history of cats,
And how they chased the mice so fast.
It's full of facts and funny lies,
That make your tummy do a rise!

***

So buy my hat, it's cheap and bright,
It makes the gloomiest days feel light.
No other hat can do this feat,
Of making every moment sweet.
It's magic woven, thread by thread,
The best invention ever bred!

***

Don't wait too long to get one now,
Before the stock runs out of town!
My talking hat is waiting here,
To make your world a happy cheer.
Just put it on and say hello,
And watch the magic start to grow!
action.label: response
